prompt: Research practical uses of AI agents in compliance-heavy financial services.

sources.title: Regulator guidance on AI governance
sources.snippet: AI governance requires documented controls and human oversight.
sources.content: Financial institutions should preserve human oversight and document controls.

report.title: AI Agents In Compliance-Heavy Financial Services
report.executiveSummary: AI agents can improve compliance operations, but regulatory uncertainty and human oversight remain central.

sections.heading: Practical Use
sections.body: AI agents are most defensible when they prepare evidence, route exceptions, and preserve human oversight.

report.markdown:
# AI Agents In Compliance-Heavy Financial Services

Regulatory uncertainty remains material. Production systems need human oversight and auditable controls.
